faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Co-op City apartments?
faqs.answer: Co-op City's high-rise buildings have numerous bathrooms, laundry facilities, and humidity from shared plumbing systems that create ideal conditions for silverfish. These pests are attracted to moisture and starch-based materials, making apartment buildings with older infrastructure particularly vulnerable. Our treatments target both the silverfish and the moisture sources that attract them.
